title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still cannot gain access. No suspicious login attempts were detected.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa card ending in 1234 but the payment keeps failing despite sufficient balance and correct details entered.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button appears but clicking it does nothing and no file is generated.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer's billing address shows a different city than what they entered. They updated it multiple times but the old address still displays on invoices and receipts.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Customer reports that the mobile app crashes immediately upon opening on their Android 13 device. The issue occurs consistently after the latest update.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet. The refund was approved in the system but the money has not returned to their account.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA codes on their registered phone number despite correct number and carrier. SMS delivery fails consistently.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer tries to upload a new profile picture but receives an 'Upload failed' error message every time. File size is within limits and format is supported.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal for their subscription but the toggle remains disabled and cannot be turned on from their account settings.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer placed an order and payment succeeded but they never received the confirmation email. Order appears correctly in their account history.
